title: ai-badger plugin entry
description: A curated external plugin+marketplace selection (plugins.json inside a <stack>/plugins/<name>/ dir). Marketplaces are referenced via a sibling marketplaces.json.

scope.description: default = inherit the scope chosen at init; local = project scope; user = user scope.

marketplacesRef.description: Path (relative to this entry dir) to the marketplaces.json declaring where the plugins come from.

plugins.description: Plugin names to install from the referenced marketplace(s).
